CustomField.description: This uses the Stage Names and set numeral so we can use it in math validations going forward or backawards a state
CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(StageName) ,"Abandoned",9 ,"Abandoned (E-Com & E-Proc)",9 ,"Bid defense and technical negotiation",4 ,"Bid/Quote Preparation & Submission",3 ,"Closed Lost",8 ,"Closed Lost (E-Com & E-Proc)",8 ,"Closed Won",7 ,"Closed Won Reagent",7 ,"Contract negotiation",5 ,"E-Launch - Closed/Won/Monitor - 100%",6 ,"Initial Qualification",1 ,"Order deferred",99 ,"Order lost",8 ,"Order won",7 ,"Stage 1 - Create/Plan",1 ,"Stage 1 - Identification E-Com & E-Proc",1 ,"Stage 1 - Qualification",1 ,"Stage 1 - Qualification/Relating",1 ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis",2 ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis/Discovery",2 ,"Stage 2 - Needs Analysis/Strategy",2 ,"Stage 2 - Qualify",2 ,"Stage 3 - Advocating/Value Proposition",3 ,"Stage 3 - Develop",3 ,"Stage 3 - Presentation/Demo (E-Com)",3 ,"Stage 3 - Solution Differentiation",3 ,"Stage 4 - Bid Preparation & Submission",4 ,"Stage 4 - Kickoff Meeting (E-Proc)",4 ,"Stage 4 - Objection Handling",4 ,"Stage 4 - Prove",4 ,"Stage 5 - Customization/Implementation",5 ,"Stage 5 - Negotiate",5 ,"Stage 5 - Negotiation",5 ,"Stage 5 - Preferred",5 ,"Stage 5 - Supporting/Objection Handling",5 ,"Stage 6 - Implement",6 ,"Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)",6 ,"Stage 6 - Negotiating/Forecast",6 ,"Stage 7 - Submit Order",7 ,"Stakeholder relationship development",2 ,"Zero Stage",0 ,0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This uses the Stage Names and set numeral so we can use it in math validations going forward or backawards a state
CustomField.label: fxStageNumber
